utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six of these items, each clearly labeled. Checking completeness: (1) property — includes selected property, price, and detailed features, so fully specified. (2) financing — includes purchase method, down payment, interest rate, term, and fees, so fully specified. (3) legal_services — includes service name, cost, and features, fully specified. (4) moving_services — includes cost, level, and features, fully specified. (5) setup_services — includes utility package, cost, and included services, fully specified. (6) total_budget — includes cost breakdown and totals, fully specified. Therefore, all six required items are covered with sufficient details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant selected a purchase property: '1-bedroom, 807 sq ft modern open-concept condo in downtown Toronto'. From the ground-truth purchase properties, this description aligns most closely with the 'New Build' option because it is modern, energy-efficient, smart home equipped, and within the CAD $480K range. The 'New Build' has a rating of 10. For financing, the assistant chose 'joint mortgage' with a 10% down payment and moderate fees. The ground truth shows 'First-Time Buyer' as the best purchase financing for that scenario with a rating of 10. The legal service selected was 'Basic Legal Package' which directly matches an entry in the ground-truth legal services with a rating of 9. The moving service chosen ('standard', cost CAD $650) corresponds exactly to 'Standard Moving' with a rating of 9. The setup service chosen is a 'basic' utility package costing CAD $120, which matches 'Basic Utilities' in the ground truth with a rating of 6.
